failures.test: bug-192-001.spec.ts — Multiple nav cycles between /anomalies and / do not freeze
failures.error: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded — locator.fill: element detached from DOM at helpers.ts:33
failures.hypothesis: beforeEach calls login() after Test 1 leaves an active session. login() navigates to /login but server detects valid session and immediately redirects → password field detaches during fill.
failures.suggested_fix: Add `await page.context().clearCookies()` before `page.goto('/login')` in login() helper, OR add test.use({ storageState: undefined }) to reset state between tests.
failures.note: bug-192-001.spec.ts is UNTRACKED (not committed to git). Was not part of v192 suite. Test itself has a session isolation bug in beforeEach. NOT a code regression — v193 changes are visual-only (gauge rings, sparklines, chart quality). The underlying BUG-192-001 functionality (single nav cycle test) PASSES.
